title: Analytics - Share Data
scenario: Analytics consent choice is logged when user toggles Share Data in App Settings > General > Account
steps: Go to App Settings → General → Account
Observe the Firebase dashboard for analytics tracking events
expected: The user's consent choice for analytics tracking is logged. The Firebase dashboard displays default elements: event graph, events in last 30 minutes, event count by country/gender, events per session, app version, app build, and app environment.
